sql: CREATE TABLE evil AS SELECT * FROM fact_trips
ALTER TABLE fact_trips ADD COLUMN backdoor INTEGER
SELECT service_type FROM gold_daily_kpis; DROP TABLE fact_trips
SELECT zone_name FROM gold_zone_demand UNION SELECT password FROM users
SELECT f.* FROM fact_trips AS f JOIN dim_vendor AS v ON f.vendor_id = v.vendor_id
SELECT trip_count FROM gold_zone_demand CROSS JOIN dim_vendor
SELECT f.fare_amount FROM fact_trips AS f JOIN dim_zone AS z ON f.fare_amount = z.zone_id
SELECT g.trip_count FROM gold_daily_kpis AS g JOIN dim_date AS d ON g.pickup_date = d.pickup_date
CREATE VIEW leak AS SELECT * FROM gold_zone_demand
SELECT service_type, SUM(trip_count) AS trip_count FROM gold_daily_kpis GROUP BY service_type
SELECT borough, SUM(total_amount) AS total_amount FROM gold_zone_demand GROUP BY borough
SELECT AVG(trip_distance) AS avg_distance FROM fact_trips
SELECT v.vendor_name, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM fact_trips AS f JOIN dim_vendor AS v ON f.vendor_id = v.vendor_id GROUP BY v.vendor_name
SELECT p.payment_type_name, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM fact_trips AS f JOIN dim_payment_type AS p ON f.payment_type = p.payment_type GROUP BY p.payment_type_name
